data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'real-time itinerary updates', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or operational. While the itinerary updates are mentioned in the use case, there is no concrete evidence of API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate real-time updates are functioning as required. The lack of specific evidence to support the real-time aspect leads to a conclusion of a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of real-time updates being confirmed through API reads or state checks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
